channel.title: Resources for MA336 Statistics on MathTR
channel.description: Recent content in Resources for MA336 Statistics on MathTR

item.title: Slides for Statistics
item.description:
List of course slides

  • Topic 1: Statistical Studies
  • Topic 2: Summarizing Data Graphically
  • Topic 3: Summarizing Data Numerically
  • Topic 4: Linear Relationship
  • Topic 5: Introduction to Probability
  • Topic 6: Two-way Tables
  • Topic 7: Discrete Random Variables
  • Topic 8: Continuous Random Variables
  • Topic 9: Sampling Distribution
  • Topic 10: Confidence Interval for a Mean
  • Topic 11: Confidence Interval for a Proportion
  • Topic 12: Concepts of Hypothesis Testing
  • Topic 13: Hypothesis Testing for a Mean or a Proportion
